data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Google.com employs a microservices architecture, allowing for modular, scalable, and independent service deployment.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Utilizes global load balancing to manage traffic efficiently across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Global load balancers, Anycast IP, BGP routing

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Leverages a wide-reaching CDN to deliver content quickly to users worldwide.

data.title: Multi-Region Deployment
data.description: Data centers deployed in multiple regions ensure high availability and disaster recovery.
data.technical_spec: Geo-redundancy, Data center routes, Failover systems

data.title: RESTful APIs
data.description: APIs designed using REST principles enable seamless integration and communication between services.
data.technical_spec: REST API standards, HTTP Methods, JSON
